name: Verisk Analytics
analysis: VRSK's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 42% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $180.0600, stop $166.4982, target $206.9256 (1.98:1) — then trail it.
